info.title: Klaviyo API (Beta)
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get the campaign variation with the given ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

patch.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Update the campaign variation with the given ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:write`

delete.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Delete the campaign variation with the given ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:write`

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Create a campaign variation.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:write`

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get the campaign message for the given campaign variation ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

get.summary: Get Message ID for Campaign Variation
get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get the campaign message [relationship](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/reference/api_overview#relationships) for the given campaign variation ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get the translation for the given campaign variation ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

get.summary: Get Translation ID for Campaign Variation
get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get the translation [relationship](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/reference/api_overview#relationships) for the given campaign variation ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

id.description: The composite ID of the translation in format {resource_type}::{qualifier}::{collection_id}

tracking_options.description: The tracking options for this message

send_options.description: The send options for this message

created.description: The datetime when this message was created

updated.description: The datetime when this message was updated

id.description: The content variations for this message

send_time.description: The UTC send time for this message

send_times.description: Per-variation send times, keyed by variation ID. Populated for send-time optimization and AB send time test strategies.

send_strategy.description: The scheduling strategy for this message.

recipient_percentage.description: The percentage of recipients to send this message to

throttling_type.description: The throttling type for this message

is_ignoring_unsubscribes.description: Whether to ignore unsubscribes for this message

created.description: The datetime when this variation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this variation was updated

created.description: The datetime when this variation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this variation was updated

action_type.description: The action type for a push notification action button.

badge_config.description: A push message variation's badge config.

push_type.description: A push message variation's push type.

text_message_type.description:
A sms message variation's text message type.

Values match the Django OmniSMSTextMessageType (MESSAGE_FORMAT_*)
    constants.

id.description: The composite ID of the translation in format {resource_type}::{qualifier}::{collection_id}

source_locale.description: The source locale for this translation

target_locales.description: The target locales for this translation

fallback_locale.description: The fallback locale for this translation

created.description: The datetime when this translation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this translation was updated

details.description: The channel-specific content details for this variation

created.description: The datetime when this variation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this variation was updated

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15.pre/reference/api-overview#authentication
